votes.rationale: Motion-0036 successfully established the first governed Claude-facing operating layer for dev-jai-nexus. The repo now includes a canonical Claude project context pack, a repo-root CLAUDE.md, a compact bootstrap-set artifact, and a Claude operating workflow grounded in the formal substrate from motion-0035.

The motion remained appropriately scoped. It improved immediate Claude project setup without drifting into provider orchestration, account automation, or cross-repo federation. The artifacts are repo-centric, governance-aware, and compact enough for practical reuse.

The implementation is coherent and strategically useful. The Claude-facing artifacts now connect generated context bundles and formal substrate artifacts to a practical day-to-day coding workflow, reducing recontextualization while preserving motion-based governance.
